title: ライスのトリート大作戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting some work finished in my office on a
day off, when...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower walks up to me in a costume and
suddenly bites my arm!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-um! Now you're... Vampire Rice's familiar!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-um! Now you're... Vampire Rice's familiar!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Now you have to stay by my side... So stop
working and come with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower brings me to an amusement park for
a Halloween event.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I get to go in for free since I'm wearing a
costume.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Want to ride a roller-coaster, Big Brother? Or
maybe the teacups?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Want to ride a roller-coaster, Big Sister? Or
maybe the teacups?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, there's honey pumpkin popcorn! Stay right
here, I'll go buy some!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
N-no! It's okay. You don't have to do anything
today, Big Brother.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
N-no! It's okay. You don't have to do anything
today, Big Sister.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look over there! What a long line... That ride
must be pretty popular.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower points toward a long and winding
line leading to the entrance of a haunted house.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
L-let's do it, Big Brother! We're already here, and
it seems popular, so...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
L-let's do it, Big Sister! We're already here, and it
seems popular, so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Rice Shower is just putting on a brave
face, but we get into line all the same...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It sure is d-d-dark, huh? A-are you all right, B-Big
Brother?
choice_data_list: I'm fine, but are you sure you're okay?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It sure is d-d-dark, huh? A-are you all right, B-Big
Sister?
choice_data_list: I'm fine, but are you sure you're okay?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm fine too! After all, today is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creeeaaak...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Gyah! What was that?!

text_block_list.name: Monsters
text_block_list.text:
Oooooh... Aaaaah!
Graaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: EEEEK! W-we're surrounded!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I step forward to protect Rice Shower, who's
trembling with fright, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no! I said I was going to take care of you today!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no! I said I was going to take care of you today!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You take care of me every day! So...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You take care of me every day! So...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Today... At least for one day... I want you to rest
and have fun!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Today... At least for one day... I want you to rest
and have fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly understand why she brought me here.
She must have seen me working on my day off
and wanted to show her appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that in mind, how do I respond to her?
choice_data_list: Leave this to your familiar, Master!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that in mind, how do I respond to her?
choice_data_list: Leave this to your familiar, Master!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Familiar? Oh, right, since I bit you earlier...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make it out of the haunted house, protecting
Rice Shower the whole way.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I was supposed to be the one taking
care of you today...
choice_data_list: Don't worry. I had plenty of fun!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really? Thank goodness...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, Big Brother? I want you to stay by my side
for a long time.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, Big Sister? I want you to stay by my side for
a long time.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So, please don't push yourself too much... You
have to take breaks...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Or else I'll come and bite you again... Just
kidding, hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower did her best to entertain me for the
day, so I promise her I won't work too hard.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Right! I'm a vampire now, after all!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-and this vampire... is scarier than you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I, um, I'll suck your blood! O-or maybe turn into
smoke and sneak up on you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
A-and... If you look me in the eye, you'll turn to
stone! Or maybe I'll curse you! Either way, I'm a
very, very scary vampire!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hiss!

text_block_list.name: Monsters
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, aaah...
Sooo... scary...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Look! The monsters left!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-now's our chance, Big Brother!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-now's our chance, Big Sister!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant... My heart is pounding...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-um, were you scared, Big Brother? I really hope
you had fun...
choice_data_list: Thanks to a certain scary vampire, I did.
Thanks to a certain scary vampire, I did.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-um, were you scared, Big Sister? I really hope
you had fun...
choice_data_list: Thanks to a certain scary vampire, I did.
Thanks to a certain scary vampire, I did.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, yay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks a bit embarrassed, but Rice Shower
smiles happily.
